description: Canonical shared port registry. Machine-local overlays stay outside this file.

entries.notes: Durable TB2 loopback origin for MCP HTTP and health routes. Public ingress must stay through reviewed tunnel routes.
Codex remote service route target. Startup entry is managed separately in startup.registry.json.
Public route target for lmstudio.colorgeek.co; review exposure before widening access.
Fixed local Vite development server. Vite strictPort is enabled so agents do not silently fall back to another port.

entries.source: DevGov dashboard and public route governance
entries.notes: Unified DevGov dashboard and public-route loopback origin for governed colorgeek.co hostnames. Public ingress must require Cloudflare Zero Trust Access.

entries.source: DevGov reviewed local-only service control governance
entries.notes: Local-only service-control listener for reviewed apply actions. This origin must never be published through Cloudflare routes.

entries.source: OpenAI MCP tunnel local filesystem bridge readiness and admin health governance
entries.notes: Loopback-only tunnel-client health, readyz, and admin UI listener for the local filesystem MCP bridge. Do not publish this origin through Cloudflare.
Fixed loopback static preview for demo/display-shader-control-lab. Keep local-only and fail fast if the port is occupied.
SBS extension and patched-upstream local proxy. Keep loopback-only; protocol launcher auto-starts this listener on demand.
Loopback app-server for the resident archive/index worker. Requires bearer token for authenticated API calls; token file stays outside registry data.
Loopback-only FFmpeg control panel for local video render workflows. Must fail closed if the port is not registered, mismatched, or occupied.
